summary: Phase 2 hotfix regression — ALL 5 targeted areas PASS. (1) Profile tab loads cleanly with no RedBox / ReferenceError after the orphan Wishlist Add Modal was removed; default Brands sub-tab renders brands list (Amazon Fashion, Myntra, Zara, H&M, ASOS, Nike, Uniqlo, Adidas, Shein, Nordstrom). (2) Tapping the Account sub-tab renders avatar-dashboard testID without crash. (3) Tapping the Brands sub-tab renders brands list without crash. (4) Social → Friends sub-tab label now reads 'ADD FRIEND BY @USERNAME OR EMAIL' (was 'ADD FRIEND BY EMAIL'). (5) Chat header & empty-state hotfix verified by navigating directly to /social/chat/{friendId} WITHOUT a `name` query param — header correctly shows 'Alice' (resolved via api.listFriends fallback) and empty-state reads 'Start the conversation with Alice.' (no trailing blank). Backend not re-tested per instructions (was 19/19 PASS in iteration_6).
critical_code_review_comments: Hotfix correctly removed all references to showAdd/wName/wDesc/wImage/addWish from /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx (grep returns zero matches; file shrank to 335 lines).

Chat header fallback (app/social/chat/[friendId].tsx lines 36–50) calls api.listFriends() only when `name` param is missing — single API call per mount, properly guarded by `active` flag; good pattern.
Empty state copy now defaults to 'your friend' if both friendName and name are empty — sensible last-resort fallback.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Reused existing test@closetai.com ↔ alice@closetai.com accepted friendship from iteration_6.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 hotfix is fully verified. Profile tab regression is closed. If future tabs are reorganized, beware of orphan JSX referencing deleted state — keep an eye on grep for stale state identifiers after refactors.
rca_of_issue: Original RCA in iteration_6 confirmed correct. Fix verified: orphan <Modal visible={showAdd}> block deleted from profile.tsx, social label updated, chat header fetches friend name via /api/friends fallback, and empty-state copy includes friend name.
